data.title: Dogecoin 'Millionaire' Remains Optimistic On This Ethereum Co-Founder Associated Coin: 'I Still Believe'
data.description: Glauber Contessoto, popularly known as SlumDOGE Millionaire, reiterated his support for Cardano (CRYPTO: ADA), despite the cryptocurrency's sluggish performance this year vis-à-vis the rest of the market.

data.title: Tesla Cybertruck Reportedly Drives Into Canada, Reservation Holders Get Invites To Configure Their Orders: Here Are The Price And Delivery Details
data.description: Electric vehicle giant Tesla has reportedly launched its Cybertruck in Canada after a long wait, with a starting price of C$137,990 on the foundation series.

data.title: Take-Two, EchoStar And 3 Stocks To Watch Heading Into Friday
OpenAI Fears 'Users Might Form Social Relationships' With AI Due To ChatGPT's Human-Like Voice Mode
data.description: OpenAI has expressed concerns about the potential emotional reliance of users on its new ChatGPT voice mode, which closely mimics human speech patterns.

data.title: Nasdaq Introduces Stricter Delisting Rules For Penny Stocks
data.description: Nasdaq will suspend companies from trading on its exchanges if their share price has been below $1 on the completion of 360 trading days.
